item.title: One Developer, Two Dozen Agents, Zero Alignment
item.description: Maggie Appleton (GitHub Next): implementation is solved; alignment is now the bottleneck in multi-agent dev teams.

item.title: Your UX Skills Were Built for One Kind of Intelligence
item.description: UX is shifting to agent behavior design — five concrete techniques for delegation patterns, oversight, and control.

item.title: design-extract — Extract Any Website's Complete Design System as a Claude Code Skill
item.description: Claude Code skill that crawls any site and extracts its full design system as tokens, Tailwind config, and CSS vars.

item.title: Squash and Stretch: Bringing SVG Icons to Life
item.description: Interactive guide applying squash-and-stretch to SVG icons using CSS path() transitions and the Motion library.

item.title: 8 Tips for Writing Agent Skills
item.description: Practical tips for writing effective agent skills: descriptions, lean instructions, testing, and when to retire them.

item.title: State of Prototyping: Spring 2026
item.description: Survey of 1,478 designers: Claude is #2 weekly tool after Figma; 59% built their own AI tool in 6 months.

item.title: Redesigning Workflows for AI
item.description: Teams that redesigned entire workflows around AI outperformed those using AI for isolated tasks.

item.title: Handmade Designs: The New Trust Signal
item.description: NNGroup: AI-fatigued users now read handmade aesthetics as a trust signal, which shifts how to frame design quality.

item.title: Agents Are the Most Honest Reviewers Your Design System Will Ever Have
item.description: How AI agents surface design system inconsistencies more reliably than manual review — a practitioner's account.

item.title: AI Interaction Atlas — Open Source AI UX Reference
item.description: Open-source reference with 100+ patterns, visual examples, and reusable components for designing AI experiences.

item.title: The new era of UX — Jenny Wen on designing Claude at Anthropic
item.description: Anthropic's Jenny Wen on designing Claude — both the AI model behavior and the user-facing product.

item.title: Identifying Necessary Transparency Moments In Agentic AI (Part 1)
item.description: Four-tool framework for mapping agentic AI decision points to the right transparency moments for user trust.

item.title: Should Designers 'Code'?
item.description: Luke Wroblewski: AI coding agents have reopened production code for designers after a decade away.

item.title: ShadCN Themer — Theme Browser and Builder for shadcn/ui
item.description: Browse and create shadcn/ui themes with customizable colors and fonts — free, no sign-up.

item.title: How Uber Built an Agentic System to Automate Design Specs in Minutes
item.description: Uber's uSpec: Cursor IDE + Figma Console MCP reads a component's Figma link and auto-generates complete anatomy, API tables, token mappings, and accessibility specs — from weeks to minutes.

item.title: Storybook MCP with Dominic Nguyen
item.description: Brad Frost and Storybook founder on how Storybook MCP lets AI generate new features using existing system components.

item.title: How I Use Claude Code to Vibe Code My Designs
item.description: Workflow: Figma JSON tokens → custom shadcn/ui theme → Figma Console MCP to generate variants and turn designs into code.

item.title: awesome-agent-skills — 1,060+ skills from official dev teams for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex
item.description: 13k-star catalog of 1,060+ agent skills from official teams including Figma, Anthropic, Vercel, and Stripe.

item.title: Build With More Context in Figma Make: Kits and Attachments
item.description: Make Kits package components, npm packages, and usage guidelines so Figma Make starts every prototype from production-aligned components. Attachments add PDFs, markdown, code, or brand files directly to any Make prompt.

item.title: Superpowers — agentic skills framework for Claude Code
item.description: Skills framework for Claude Code: brainstorming, planning, debugging — 131K stars.
